---
title: "Benjamin Black"
subtitle: "Head of the working group"
image: images/sarah-johnson.jpg
image-alt: "Photo of Sarah Johnson"
description: "Sarah brings over 15 years of experience in software architecture and team leadership. She's passionate about building scalable systems and mentoring developers."
skills:
  - Python
  - Cloud Architecture
  - Team Leadership
  - System Design
projects:
  - title: "Cloud Migration Platform"
    url: "/projects/cloud-migration"
  - title: "Microservices Framework"
    url: "/projects/microservices"
  - title: "Developer Portal"
    url: "/projects/dev-portal"
toc: false
links:
    - icon: link
      text: website
      href: https://blenback.github.io/
---

<!-- ```{=html} -->
<!-- <meta http-equiv="Refresh" content="0; url='https://blenback.github.io/'" /> -->
<!-- ``` -->

:::{#person-profile}
:::
